summary: Comma-style FROM with three correlation aliases (c, a, p) — the aliases must not leak as databases. KNOWN regex gap: the regex `appears_as_read_source` only matches when FROM/JOIN/USING directly precedes the qualified name; comma-continued sources are missed. The AST implementation parses the comma list structurally and gets all three. This is one of the trust-sensitive scenarios ADR 0015 cites.
